acceptedAnswer.text: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on all purchases. If you're not satisfied with your purchase, you can return it within 30 days for a full refund.
Standard shipping takes 5-7 business days. Express shipping is available and takes 2-3 business days. International shipping may take 10-14 business days.
Yes, we ship to over 50 countries worldwide. Shipping rates and delivery times vary by location. You can see the exact shipping cost at checkout.

mainEntity.name: How can I contact customer support?

acceptedAnswer.text: You can reach our customer support team via email at support@example.com, by phone at 1-800-555-1234, or through our live chat available on our website Monday-Friday 9am-6pm EST.
Yes, we use industry-standard SSL encryption to protect your payment information. We are PCI DSS compliant and never store your full credit card details on our servers.
